android.label: Google Play
checklist: Create Play Console app with unique package name (manifest packaging.capacitor.appId)
Upload privacy policy URL (generate via npm run store:prep)
Complete Data safety form: microphone (SFX), optional multiplayer (PeerJS)
Target API 34+; test on physical device
Build signed AAB: Android Studio → Generate signed bundle — or configure signing in android/
Internal testing track → closed → production
Store listing: short + full description, 512 icon, feature graphic, screenshots

ios.label: App Store / TestFlight
checklist: Apple Developer account + App Store Connect app record
Bundle ID matches manifest packaging.ios.bundleId
Xcode Signing & Capabilities → Team + automatic signing
Product → Archive → Distribute → App Store Connect
App Privacy: microphone, multiplayer networking if used
Screenshots: 6.7" and 6.5" iPhone required
TestFlight internal → external → App Store review

windows.label: Windows distribution
checklist: Default ship: portable .exe (no installer) — itch.io / direct download
Optional code sign: set CSC_LINK + CSC_KEY_PASSWORD before package:win
SmartScreen: signed builds reduce warnings
Test fullscreen, mic, and bundled assets on clean VM
Steam: Phase M — separate depot pipeline

macos.label: macOS Electron (.dmg)
checklist: Build on macOS: npm run package:mac
Notarization: APPLE_ID, APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD, CSC_LINK
Gatekeeper: staple notarization ticket
Capacitor iOS is separate from Electron macOS — ship WKWebView app via Xcode for Mac App Store if needed
